title: uvifera cubensis
intro: Uvifera cubensis, commonly known as the Jamaican dogwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include pain relief and treatment of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Uvifera cubensis are attributed to its therapeutic actions, such as sedation, anti-anxiety, and analgesic effects. The plant contains bioactive constituents like terpenoids and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
